reasoning: Tech sector (XLK) leading premarket with +1.07% while financials (XLF) remain flat at +0.04% and energy modest at +0.37%. This is narrow risk-on leadership — XLK outperforming SPY by 79bp suggests tech/growth momentum is driving the +5.56pt overnight gap and premarket rally. VIX falling (-1.61%) supports bullish sentiment. However, lack of financial sector participation (0.04% is essentially flat) and weak energy suggest breadth concerns — classic tech-only momentum pattern. Bullish bias on tech strength, but watch for rotation risk if XLF doesn't accelerate through the open.
key_observations: XLK: +1.07% — clear tech leadership, well above 0.5% threshold, driving momentum
XLF: +0.04% — flat, no financial participation despite yield-curve-positive gap
XLE: +0.37% — weak energy, no commodity inflation story yet
Breadth: SPY up only +0.28% vs XLK +1.07% = 79bp outperformance, indicates narrow tech-only rally
VIX falling (-1.61%) supports bullish lean, IV regime MID (neutral)
Overnight context: +5.56pt gap up, ribbon BULL stack, suggests positive overnight catalyst
